_note: Canonical player list. 'aliases' = every spelling that appears in the workbooks. Grows as each year is extracted. Ryan reviews each addition.

players.name: Big Gay Al
players.note: One-time stand-in, 2005 only; real name unknown. NOT Roy Hoenisch (Ryan re-confirmed 2026-07-02).

players.name: Roy Hoenisch
players.note: Ryan's final ruling 2026-07-08 (from Roy himself): every 'Big Gay' name except Big Gay Al (the one-year 2005 stand-in) is Roy Hoenisch — 'Big Gay Roy', 'BGR', 'Roy', and 'Big Gay Loyd' (2012-2018) all map here. There is no separate Loyd. Roy: 2006, 2008, 2010-2018, 2020-2025.

players.name: Billy
players.note: 'Brother Billy'. First appears 2007 (1 round), full trips from 2009. Full name unknown, Ryan to identify.

players.name: Cookie AC Milan
players.note: NEW in 2014. Real name unknown, Ryan to identify.

players.name: T-Dog Hitman
players.note: NEW in 2014. Real name unknown, Ryan to identify.

players.name: Craig
players.note: NEW in 2007. Last name unknown, Ryan to identify. 'Knees' in the 2008 Myrtle Cup doc.

players.name: Irv
players.note: NEW in 2007. Full name unknown, Ryan to identify.

players.name: Deadman
players.note: NOT A REAL PLAYER. 2016 placeholder for the missing 12th man (11-player trip, Ryan confirmed 2026-07-04). Kept for Mist-Weed match records ('<carrier> (DM)' rows); excluded from the 2016 leaderboard. Site should exclude phantom players from rosters.
